title: Prisma Craft
description: A massive project that greatly complements the idea of ​​Prismarine and improves the mechanics of fishing. New tools, armor, blocks, mobs, mechanics and structures.
body:
## 💡Main idea
Prismarine in the game is a rather interesting material, with a dungeon, several mobs, and even a whole lore. However, crafting a few blocks is all that ends... To improve the functionality of prismarine, this datapack was developed! Now you can craft new tools, armor, blocks, and decorations from prismarine. Fishing mechanics have also been improved, as well as the loot list. Along with this, quite a few new structures and even mechanics have been added.

## 
## 🎞Official video review:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nlslcGs5SXY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 
## ✨Main changes and innovations
- Items while fishing have been improved.
- Added spearfishing mechanics.
- Added several interesting mobs.
- Added many interesting underwater structures.
- Thanks to the Sea Workbench, you can craft Prismarine tools.
- Another miniboss has been added to the Monument.

## 
## 📚WIKI
You can get all the information you need from the book that fishermen sell in the villages. Along with this, the project has its own [WIKIpedia](https://bigsty.github.io/PrismaWIKI/index.html) with all the details and without ads. WIKI is only translated into Russian, but you can use Google's website translator.

## 
## 🆘Important information
- **THE ENTIRE DATAPACK HAS BEEN TRANSLATED INTO 3 LANGUAGES**: English, Ukrainian, Russian. Translation works depending on the selected language in the game. 
- Project does **NOT NEED Optifine** or other mods.

##
